data.html_text: As the issue appears for all users and across all networks, I am increasing the severity to Critical. Receive transactions were visible yesterday, so this seems to be a recent regression. I believe the backend side should be investigated as well. cc: @Alex Atrash @Eddy WM
data.text:
As the issue appears for all users and across all networks, I am increasing the severity to Critical.
Receive transactions were visible yesterday, so this seems to be a recent regression.
I believe the backend side should be investigated as well.
cc: https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1211860479278729 https://app.asana.com/1/45238840754660/profile/1213406456321934
